title: Spec: Address link-layer metadata exposure
description: Spec acknowledges 'Metadata visible: Link-layer headers unencrypted' but doesn't mitigate. Enables: traffic analysis, node tracking via IID/EUI-64, network topology discovery by passive adversaries. Consider: IID rotation, traffic padding, dummy messages for cover traffic.
close_reason: Not a concern per threat model: auth-only, not concealment. Running in the clear is intentional.
